info.title: Flightradar24 API
info.description: Flightradar24 API provides access to real-time and historical flight tracking data, including live flight positions, flight summaries, flight tracks, flight events, airline information, and airport information. Data is available from May 11, 2016 onward for historical queries.

get.description: Retrieves basic airline information filtered by ICAO code.
Retrieves basic airport information by IATA (3-letter) or ICAO (4-letter) code.
Retrieves detailed airport information including runways, timezone, and geographic data.
Retrieves real-time aircraft position data with basic parameters. At least one filter parameter is required.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive real-time flight information including origin, destination, and aircraft type. At least one filter parameter is required.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Returns count of live flight positions matching filter criteria. Does not support the airspaces parameter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

200.description: Count of matching live flight positions.

get.description: Retrieves historical flight position data with basic details. Historical data available from May 11, 2016 onward. The timestamp parameter is required.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive historical flight position data. Historical data available from May 11, 2016 onward. The timestamp parameter is required.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Returns count of historical flight positions matching filter criteria. The timestamp parameter is required.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

200.description: Count of matching historic flight positions.

get.description: Retrieves lightweight flight summaries. Either flight_ids or a time range (flight_datetime_from and flight_datetime_to) must be supplied.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Retrieves detailed flight summaries with additional fields. Either flight_ids or a time range must be supplied.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Returns the count of flight summaries matching filter criteria. Either flight_ids or a time range must be supplied.
Retrieves positional tracking data (trackpoints) for a specific flight.

parameters.name: flight_id
parameters.description: Flightradar24 ID of active flight in hexadecimal (e.g., '34242a02').

get.description: Retrieves lightweight historical flight event data.

parameters.name: flight_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of FR24 flight IDs (max 15).

parameters.name: event_types
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of event types to filter.

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive historical flight event data with additional flight and aircraft details such as origin, destination, and aircraft type.

parameters.name: flight_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of FR24 flight IDs (max 15).

parameters.name: event_types
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of event types to filter.

get.description: Retrieves information on API account usage for the specified time period.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Obtain your API token from the Flightradar24 API portal. Can also be set via the FR24_API_TOKEN environment variable when using the official SDKs.

flights.name: flights
flights.description: Comma-separated list of flight numbers (max 15, e.g., 'SK2752,KL1316').

painted_as.name: painted_as
painted_as.description: Comma-separated list of airline ICAO codes for livery filtering (max 15).

operating_as.name: operating_as
operating_as.description: Comma-separated list of airline ICAO codes for operator filtering (max 15).

altitude_ranges.name: altitude_ranges
altitude_ranges.description: Comma-separated list of altitude ranges in format 'min-max' feet (max 15, e.g., '0-5000,30000-40000').

categories.name: categories
categories.description: Comma-separated list of flight categories (max 15). Values: P (Passenger), C (Cargo), M (Military/Government), J (Business Jets), T (General Aviation), H (Helicopters), B (Lighter than Air), G (Gliders), D (Drones), V (Ground Vehicles), O (Other), N (Non-categorized).

data_sources.name: data_sources
data_sources.description: Comma-separated list of data source identifiers (max 15).

airspaces.name: airspaces
airspaces.description: Comma-separated list of airspace identifiers (max 15). Not available on count endpoints.

timestamp.name: timestamp
timestamp.description: UNIX timestamp for the historical data point. Historical data is available from May 11, 2016.

flight_ids.name: flight_ids
flight_ids.description: Comma-separated list of FR24 flight IDs (max 15).

flight_datetime_from.name: flight_datetime_from
flight_datetime_from.description: Start of time range filter (ISO 8601 datetime).

flight_datetime_to.name: flight_datetime_to
flight_datetime_to.description: End of time range filter (ISO 8601 datetime).

BadRequest.description: Bad request. Missing or invalid parameters.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication failed. Invalid or missing bearer token.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

PaymentRequired.description: Payment required. Insufficient credits or subscription.

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded. Too many requests.

FlightPositionsFull.description: Full flight position data extending light data with origin, destination, and aircraft details.

FlightSummaryFull.description: Full flight summary extending light data with additional details.

details.description: Event-specific details. Structure varies by event type.

FlightEventsFull.description: Full flight events extending light data with origin, destination, and aircraft details.

data.description: List of usage summaries per endpoint.

tags.name: Historic Flight Positions
tags.description: Historical flight position data (available from May 11, 2016).

tags.name: Flight Summary
tags.description: Flight summary data with filtering and sorting.

tags.name: Historic Flight Events
tags.description: Historical flight event data (gate departure, takeoff, landing, etc.).

tags.name: Usage
tags.description: API usage statistics and credit tracking.
